description: GraphQL LSP extension that adds autocompletion, validation, go to definition, hover, outline and more.

graphql-config.dotEnvPath.description: optional .env load file path, if not the default. specify a relative path to the .env file to be loaded by dotenv module. you can also import dotenv in the config file.

graphql-config.load.legacy.description: legacy mode for graphql config v2 config

graphql-config.load.rootDir.description: Base dir for graphql config loadConfig(), to look for config files or package.json

vscode-graphql.cacheSchemaFileForLookup.description: Use a cached file output of your graphql-config schema result for definition lookups, symbols, outline, etc. Enabled by default when one or more schema entry is not a local file with SDL in it. Disable if you want to use SDL with a generated schema.

vscode-graphql.debug.description: Enable debug logs and node debugger for client

vscode-graphql.largeFileThreshold.description: Disables outlining and other expensive operations for files larger than this threshold (in bytes). Defaults to 1000000 (one million).

vscode-graphql.rejectUnauthorized.description: Fail the request on invalid certificate

vscode-graphql.schemaCacheTTL.description: Schema cache ttl in milliseconds - the interval before requesting a fresh schema when caching the local schema file is enabled. Defaults to 30000 (30 seconds).

vscode-graphql.transport.description: The transport used between the language server and the client.
